summary: Session persistence for DepositPage fully tested and working. Client can return to active trade after closing browser using localStorage client_session_id. All features verified: trade restoration, status-to-step mapping, chat message persistence, cancel button availability.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/payment-links/{link_id}/active-trade with valid client_id returns trade - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payment-links/{link_id}/active-trade with invalid client_id returns null - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payment-links/{link_id}/active-trade without client_id works - PASSED
Backend: Payment link 512a69d2 exists and is active - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/trades/{id}/public returns correct trade data - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/trades/{id}/messages-public returns chat messages - PASSED
Backend: Trade status correctly maps to UI step (paid -> waiting) - PASSED
Frontend: Fresh user (no localStorage) sees operator selection page - PASSED
Frontend: Returning user with valid session sees restored trade (waiting step) - PASSED
Frontend: Different session ID shows operator selection (no trade restored) - PASSED
Frontend: Trade ID displayed correctly (#trd_6360efed) - PASSED
Frontend: Amount displayed correctly (1,000 RUB) - PASSED
Frontend: Cancel button visible for paid trades - PASSED
Frontend: Chat section visible with message input - PASSED
Frontend: Support button shows 10 min wait for paid status - PASSED
Frontend: Chat messages persist between sessions - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Used existing test trade trd_6360efed with status 'paid' for session persistence testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence feature fully tested. Key implementation: 1) localStorage key 'deposit_client_{linkId}' stores client_session_id, 2) On page load, fetchData() calls GET /api/payment-links/{linkId}/active-trade?client_id={sessionId}, 3) If active trade found, restores step based on status (pending->payment, paid->waiting, disputed->disputed, completed->completed), 4) Trade creation includes client_session_id in POST /api/trades body. Test trade trd_6360efed has status 'paid' and correctly shows 'waiting' step with chat messages.
